# .github

## Purpose
GitHub-specific configuration. Contains GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow definitions.

## Subdirectories

| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `workflows/` | CI (lint/test/build) and deploy (Docker → GHCR) pipelines — see `workflows/AGENTS.md` |
